name: Zooted
problem: A lightweight Windows utility that keeps your PC awake. Quiet, persistent, present.

name: PhotoMove
problem: Bulk photo deduplication and date-based sorting. Reads EXIF, filenames, and JSON sidecars to organize thousands of scattered photos into clean 6-month folders.

name: Job Tracker
problem: A real job search dashboard with pipeline visualization, application funnel analytics, and interview prep tracking. Because spreadsheets don't cut it.

name: EM Job Board
problem: A centralized job board for displaced emergency management and disaster recovery professionals. Aggregates niche postings that get buried on Indeed and LinkedIn.

name: NSFW Scanner
problem: Scans a directory and flags potentially NSFW images using ML classification. For when you need to audit a drive before selling it or handing it off.
